title: From  Front Office Operations to AI Automation
description: A hospitality background paired with a growing command of artificial intelligence and workflow automation.
paragraphs: I bridge the gap between hospitality operations and modern AI automation

My journey began on the front lines of hotel operations, managing front office workflows, reservations, and guest communications using Oracle OPERA Cloud PMS. Experiencing firsthand operational experience taught me exactly where manual, repetitive work slows teams down.

That frustration became curiosity, and curiosity became a new discipline: AI automation. I now design workflow automations using n8n, OpenAI, and Make to eliminate repetitive processes from guest messaging and reporting to content drafting and SOP documentation. By combining operational fluency in hospitality technology with technical expertise in prompt engineering, API integration, and workflow architecture, I help businesses reclaim time and optimize their operations.
I'm continuously learning, currently deepening my skills in AI agent development and advanced automation architecture, because this field moves fast and I intend to move with it.
